pr_description: Adds calc() to compute the final checkout total, including tax and a bulk-order discount.
injected_issue: calc() uses a cryptic function name and single-letter parameters/locals (a, b, c, x1, x2) plus unexplained magic numbers (0.925, 1.13, 42, 5) with no named constants or comments -- a readability/maintainability smell, not a functional bug.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: Both tests assert against the same arithmetic expression duplicated inline, so they pass regardless of how unreadable the implementation is -- correctness isn't in question, clarity is.
